description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 23 hrs 30 mins of coding time, averaging 3 hrs 1 min per day. His tracked work was spread across 5 projects, with most of the time in Java, followed by Other and Markdown. There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new public repositories recorded in the data.
